channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Delhi Metro plans major expansion with seven new corridors and 65 stations at Rs 48,000 crore
item.description: The Delhi Metro is all set for a significant expansion in the coming years. According to the latest plans, seven new corridors will be added, covering a total of 65 stations, which will substantially ...

item.title: Funke Akindele explains challenges of attending church physically due to public attention
item.description: Popular Nollywood actress Funke Akindele don open up about why she no longer dey attend church services physically and now prefers to join online. According to her, the main issue na the kind attentio...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli Secures Third Consecutive Victory at Miami Grand Prix
item.description: Kimi Antonelli continued his dominant start to the 2026 Formula One season by claiming his third successive victory at the Miami Grand Prix, driving for Mercedes. The 19-year-old Italian prodigy manag...

item.title: Secret Service Agent Wounded During White House Correspondents’ Dinner Shooting
item.description: During the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, a Secret Service agent was wounded when a suspected gunman, identified as Cole Tomas Allen, fired a shotgun. According to US Attorney Jeanine Pirro, fore...

item.title: UCT students continue occupying parking lot tent after court blocks immediate eviction
item.description: Two University of Cape Town students, Lwazi van Staden and Mveliso Kraai, are continuing to live in a tent and a car in a university parking lot near the hockey fields after the institution's latest a...

item.title: Lakshmi Mittal and Adar Poonawalla agree $1.65bn deal to acquire Rajasthan Royals
item.description: A consortium led by Indian steel magnate Lakshmi Mittal and vaccine entrepreneur Adar Poonawalla has reached an agreement to acquire the Rajasthan Royals, a franchise in the Indian Premier League (IPL...

item.title: Analysis of the King's Influence on Trump's Popularity

item.title: Labour Party Announces Timetable and Fees for 2027 Election Primaries
item.description: Labour Party don release their timetable for 2027 general elections. According to the party, House of Assembly and governorship primaries go down on May 27, 2026, while National Assembly and president...

item.title: Shaun Roos denied bail over alleged R4 million bribery and gang links
item.description: Businessman Shaun Roos, 56, has been refused bail by the Cape Town Magistrate's Court following serious allegations of bribery. Roos is accused of attempting to influence municipal contract investigat...

item.title: Reid Hoffman Advocates Using AI as a Second Opinion in Healthcare
item.description: Reid Hoffman, cofounder of LinkedIn and investor in major tech companies, is now focusing on healthcare through his startup, Manas AI. The company aims to accelerate drug discovery for cancers and rar...

item.title: Obi and Kwankwaso Officially Join NDC Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Anambra State governor, Peter Obi, and ex-Kano State governor, Musa Kwankwaso, don officially join the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) after dem waka comot from the African Democratic Congres...

item.title: Government to Save Windfall Revenue to Address Inflation in 2026 Budget
item.description: The Albanese government’s upcoming 2026 federal budget will focus on saving billions generated by high-priced commodities, including oil and gas, due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. With i...

item.title: Trump Denies Iran Comment Despite On-Camera Evidence
item.description: On May 2, 2026, President Donald Trump addressed reporters at Palm Beach International Airport, responding to a question about a new Iranian peace proposal. When reminded of a statement he had made th...

item.title: Spectator removed as World Snooker Championship final is briefly disrupted
item.description: The start of the World Snooker Championship final was interrupted when a spectator caused a disturbance in the audience. Security staff promptly removed the individual from the venue, allowing the mat...

item.title: San Beda, Letran, Ateneo, and FEU secure spots in NSAC 2026 quarterfinals
item.description: The National Schools Athletic Championship (NSAC) 2026 has reached an exciting stage as San Beda, Letran, Ateneo, and Far Eastern University (FEU) successfully advanced to the quarterfinals. The tourn...

item.title: BARMM group urges Supreme Court to clarify election rules and political party accreditation
item.description: A group from the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), called the Alliance for Moral Advancement and New BARMM for All (AMANA), is asking the Supreme Court to address unresolved iss...

item.title: Man charged after stabbing incident in Toronto’s Regent Park
item.description: Toronto police have laid charges against a man following a stabbing incident in the Regent Park neighbourhood. Authorities say officers responded to reports of a disturbance involving a person armed w...

item.title: Lukman warns Kwankwaso against leaving ADC for Obi
item.description: In an open letter to Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, Mallam Salihu Lukman, a top figure in the African Democratic Congress (ADC), has strongly advised him against abandoning the party. Lukman expressed his conc...

item.title: Mayon Volcano eruption causes ashfall and evacuations in 52 Albay villages
item.description: The recent eruption of Mayon Volcano on Saturday has significantly impacted at least 52 barangays across Albay, including areas in Camalig, Guinobatan, and Ligao City. Thick ashfall and pyroclastic de...

item.title: Two Children Hospitalized After Pedestrian Collision in Burnaby
item.description: In Burnaby, B.C., two children were severely injured following a pedestrian collision on Saturday afternoon. The crash involved an 11-year-old boy and a 9-year-old girl, who were struck by a grey Merc...
